mapper.select: select id, username, phone, password, enabled, avatar_url, created_at from campus_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, phone, password, enabled, avatar_url, created_at from campus_user where id = #{id} limit 1
select id, username, phone, password, enabled, avatar_url, created_at from campus_user where phone = #{phone} limit 1
select r.id, r.code, r.name from campus_role r inner join campus_user_role ur on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select id, code, name from campus_role where code = #{code} limit 1

select distinct u.id, u.username, u.phone, u.password, u.enabled, u.avatar_url, u.created_at from campus_user u inner join campus_user_role ur on ur.user_id = u.id inner join campus_role r on r.id = ur.role_id where r.code in
#{roleCode}
and (u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by u.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into campus_user (username, phone, password, enabled, avatar_url, created_at) values (#{username}, #{phone}, #{password}, #{enabled}, #{avatarUrl}, now())
mapper.update: update campus_user set username = #{username}, phone = #{phone}, password = #{password}, enabled = #{enabled}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl} where id = #{id}
